headline: Throughput scaling broke out as the quarter's defining theme while the agent technique cluster cooled.
body: Throughput scaling entered as a new outlier, anchored by work pushing toward 1000 tokens per second on a trillion-parameter model and NVIDIA's NVFP4 quantization guidance on Blackwell hardware for faster frontier pre-training. Apple rotated its core AI architecture onto Google Gemini foundation models rather than proprietary alternatives, alongside a new Apple Core AI framework and renewed Siri attention. The established technique cluster, prompt engineering, agent orchestration, multi-session workflows, and iterative AI layer evolution, all weakened together, even as the singular agent slug and token pricing surfaced as fresh breakouts and a 400B agentic model arrived. A reported supply-chain compromise targeting Claude and Gemini users added a security note to the window.

cited_items.title: Apple reveals new AI architecture built around Google Gemini models
Train Models Faster with JAX and MaxText Using NVFP4 on NVIDIA Blackwell
Nex N2 Pro: Frontier agentic performance at 400B
Two Leaps to 1000 Tokens/s on a 1T-Parameter Model
